notes: Three.js r0.160 via CDN import map (ESM). Four procedurally-rigged characters (Michael Jackson w/ red jacket + single white glove, Pepe, Trump w/ signature hair, Elon) built from primitive geometry with named joints. Procedural Thriller choreography: head rolls, lurching sway/bounce, side-step shuffle, and a blended cycle between the unison claw-raise and zombie forward-reach, phase-offset per dancer for a wave. Cinematic graveyard: full moon + glow sprite, starfield, gravestones, dead trees, drifting fog sprites, 4 colored disco spotlights sweeping, periodic double-flicker lightning (auto + manual button), ACES tone mapping, soft shadows, and UnrealBloom post-processing. Auto cinematic orbit camera (toggle to free OrbitControls). No external assets; self-contained except the CDN Three.js import.
